item.title: Version 1.0.4
item.description:
Graphoris 1.0.4

  • Fix: restore active-state highlight on canvas header
  • Fix: save dialog loop and table reactivity issues
  • Fix: 3D marker size rendering bug
  • Fix: data table dark mode and multi-row delete
  • Feat: JSON file importer with smart nested data extraction
  • Feat: NSTableView-based data table for improved performance
  • Feat: support dropdown with Discord link
